<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving UP to see if there's a gap at a different row
result = action(['UP'])
print("Action result:", result)

# Check new player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"Green frame: rows {r_min}-{max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])}, cols {c_min}-{max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"Green frame: rows {r_min}-{max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])}, cols {c_min}-{max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
